tasks.description: In calc.py, the add(a, b) function returns a - b instead of a + b. Fix it so the tests pass.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_001/calc.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_001-2055874-193eac6026d7469190490dc51db0e499/calc.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_001/calc.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573541250 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_001-2055874-193eac6026d7469190490dc51db0e499/calc.py	2026-06-15 12:18:04.595863791 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def add(a, b):
-    return a - b
+    return a + b

tasks.description: In seq.py, last(xs) raises IndexError because it uses xs[len(xs)] (off by one). Fix it to return the last element.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_002/seq.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_002-2055874-100e8298c5a54ec2b168fee9b65daeb1/seq.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_002/seq.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573746791 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_002-2055874-100e8298c5a54ec2b168fee9b65daeb1/seq.py	2026-06-15 12:18:23.625305120 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def last(xs):
-    return xs[len(xs)]
+    return xs[-1]

tasks.description: In mathx.py, double(x) computes x * 2 but never returns it (returns None). Add the missing return.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_003/mathx.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_003-2055874-3684069c4a9c4c68b2c77e611d7556e6/mathx.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_003/mathx.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573872048 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_003-2055874-3684069c4a9c4c68b2c77e611d7556e6/mathx.py	2026-06-15 12:19:25.612740649 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def double(x):
-    x * 2
+    return x * 2

tasks.description: In counts.py, get_count(d, k) raises KeyError when k is absent. Make it return 0 for missing keys.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_004/counts.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_004-2055874-475aabff07384103abd0c6c14cc312ec/counts.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_004/counts.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573999933 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_004-2055874-475aabff07384103abd0c6c14cc312ec/counts.py	2026-06-15 12:21:39.977842798 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def get_count(d, k):
-    return d[k]
+    return d.get(k, 0)

tasks.description: In strutil.py, reverse(s) returns the string unchanged. Make it return the reversed string.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_005/strutil.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_005-2055874-b01ec13c3f9b4bb08807bbbbb924843a/strutil.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_005/strutil.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574125337 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_005-2055874-b01ec13c3f9b4bb08807bbbbb924843a/strutil.py	2026-06-15 12:21:59.216286040 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def reverse(s):
-    return s
+    return s[::-1]

tasks.description: In nums.py, evens(xs) keeps ODD numbers (x % 2 == 1). Fix it to keep even numbers.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_006/nums.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_006-2055874-ddb7924c4a094b4c8917501e9edd355c/nums.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_006/nums.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574248297 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_006-2055874-ddb7924c4a094b4c8917501e9edd355c/nums.py	2026-06-15 12:22:17.427705427 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def evens(xs):
-    return [x for x in xs if x % 2 == 1]
+    return [x for x in xs if x % 2 == 0]

tasks.description: In fact.py, factorial(0) recurses forever because the base case is `n == 1`. Fix the base case so factorial(0) == 1.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_007/fact.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_007-2055874-087eee997b01471b950dd67516ad39a8/fact.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_007/fact.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574410453 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_007-2055874-087eee997b01471b950dd67516ad39a8/fact.py	2026-06-15 12:22:37.133159021 -0400
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 def factorial(n):
-    if n == 1:
+    if n == 0:
         return 1
     return n * factorial(n - 1)

tasks.description: In valid.py, in_range(x, lo, hi) uses OR so it's always true. Fix it to require x within [lo, hi].
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_008/valid.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_008-2055874-67692451d786459bbbd3a5c21efb51e0/valid.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_008/valid.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574538384 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_008-2055874-67692451d786459bbbd3a5c21efb51e0/valid.py	2026-06-15 12:22:56.436603166 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def in_range(x, lo, hi):
-    return x >= lo or x <= hi
+    return x >= lo and x <= hi

tasks.description: In helper.py, slugify replaces spaces with '' instead of '-', so make_slug in api.py is wrong. Fix slugify.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_009/helper.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_009-2055874-2722de123657496ea5f3111650c000f5/helper.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_009/helper.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574662768 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_009-2055874-2722de123657496ea5f3111650c000f5/helper.py	2026-06-15 12:26:56.866121509 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def slugify(s):
-    return s.replace(" ", "")
+    return s.replace(" ", "-")

tasks.description: In acc.py, Accumulator.add overwrites total (self.total = x) instead of accumulating. Fix it to add.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_010/acc.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_010-2055874-d1f7924e510940d3bc0c60fcc7ffc361/acc.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_010/acc.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574662768 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_010-2055874-d1f7924e510940d3bc0c60fcc7ffc361/acc.py	2026-06-15 12:27:16.749576935 -0400
@@ -2,5 +2,5 @@
     def __init__(self):
         self.total = 0
     def add(self, x):
-        self.total = x
+        self.total += x
         return self.total

tasks.description: In math_utils.py, square(x) returns x + x instead of x * x, so sum_of_squares in stats.py is wrong. Fix square.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_011/math_utils.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_011-2055874-6355aedb85884e99891b772b6530f9a9/math_utils.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_011/math_utils.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574961395 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_011-2055874-6355aedb85884e99891b772b6530f9a9/math_utils.py	2026-06-15 12:27:35.502006347 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def square(x):
-    return x + x
+    return x * x

tasks.description: In running.py, running_max initializes m = 0, so it returns 0 for all-negative inputs. Fix the initialization to handle negatives.
In avg.py, average(xs) raises ZeroDivisionError on an empty list. Make it return 0 for empty input.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_013/avg.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_013-2055874-accb3925df074423b8008aedb5197cc4/avg.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_013/avg.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.575136381 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_013-2055874-accb3925df074423b8008aedb5197cc4/avg.py	2026-06-15 12:28:34.879365373 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def average(xs):
-    return sum(xs) / len(xs)
+    return sum(xs) / len(xs) if xs else 0

tasks.description: In ops.py, one of the four functions is wrong: mul(a, b) returns a + b instead of a * b. Fix it.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_014/ops.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_014-2055874-a0381c6f8e1d4b65b59c11ad1346d331/ops.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_014/ops.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.575453999 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_014-2055874-a0381c6f8e1d4b65b59c11ad1346d331/ops.py	2026-06-15 12:28:56.783866487 -0400
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
     return a - b
 
 def mul(a, b):
-    return a + b
+    return a * b
 
 def div(a, b):
     return a / b
